calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-17-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
JASON MAGUFFEE, Defendant appearing in Propria Persona
No other appearance.

RULING:
Tentative Ruling adopted: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is denied. The levying officer is directed to release 75 percent of the earnings held to the judgment debtor and 25 percent of the earnings to the judgment creditor. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
